title: Add Meshtastic multi-section config sync records
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6 currently emits one valid Config.LoRaConfig readback during want_config_id stage 69420, but Meshtastic apps may expect separate Config records for device, position, power, bluetooth, network, display, security, and device_ui. What needs to be done: define which read-only config sections are required by Android/iOS/Python app sync, encode each as a separate valid FromRadio.config oneof record, add native_sim tests and update meshtastic_app_compat vectors. Acceptance criteria: no Config payload contains multiple oneof variants; app-visible placeholders for position/power/bluetooth are explicit; sequence/vector docs match implementation.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware scope for multi-section Meshtastic Config sync. Code/docs/vectors changed: added section-specific Config oneof encoder for device, position, power, network, display, lora, bluetooth, security, and device_ui; adapter queues one FromRadio.config per section in stage 69420 and legacy/full-sync; existing LoRa config wrapper remains API-compatible; DeviceUI brightness placeholder is schema-valid (1); gateway BLE queues split into FromRadio depth (default 20, range 17..32) and ToRadio depth (default 8, range 1..16); adapter preflights want_config bursts when queue_free is available to avoid partial unterminated sync; docs/smoke vectors updated. Follow-ups created: project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.2.1 queue_free contract, project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.2.2 section-aware vectors, project-LICHEN-t2hn.6.2.3 Kconfig/test drift guard.

Local validation: git diff --check PASS; python/.venv/bin/python -m pytest python/tests/test_vectors.py -q PASS (81 passed in 0.15s); python3 -m json.tool test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json PASS; test/vectors/generate.py regenerated vectors.

EC2 validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 using clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate with patch applied over origin/main: direct native_sim west build/run meshtastic_codec PASS 29/29; meshtastic_adapter PASS 56/56; meshtastic_ble PASS 8/8 (native_sim warning: Bluetooth device missing, expected for host-only test). Final Twister command: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-t2hn62-final-native --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen. Result: 4/4 configurations passed, 110 test cases, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 skipped, 0 warnings in 73.37s. Gateway native_sim build command passed: west build -b native_sim lichen/apps/gateway -d build/gateway-native-t2hn62 --pristine -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-t2hn65-validate/lichen. Gateway ELF size: text=149981 data=6001 bss=47933 dec=203915.

Code review: initial reviewers found queue exact-fit/backpressure, DeviceUI brightness range, Kconfig lower-bound, ToRadio/FromRadio queue coupling, and docs drift; all fixed. Final post-preflight reviews from Gibbs, Locke, and Meitner reported no findings. Residual non-blocking gaps were filed as child Beads.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware scope: multi-section Config sync implemented, tested, reviewed, vectors/docs updated; residual gaps filed as child Beads.
